title: La donna che venne dal mare
writer: Francesco De Robertis, Pasquale Festa Campanile, Massimo Franciosa
actors: Sandra Milo, Vittorio De Sica, Rossella Monti
plot: Danae, a woman who came from the sea is a beautiful blonde girl at the center of a spy story during the second world war. In Gibraltar, Italian and British divers perform mutual sabotage actions. The secret agents, on the other hand,
